findings.issue: Finnhub API key is hardcoded and exposed in source code
findings.suggestion: Move API key to environment variable (process.env.FINNHUB_KEY)
findings.est_impact: Security breach; key should be rotated immediately

findings.issue: runPython() returns null on error but callers don't validate before using result
findings.suggestion: Add explicit null checks after each runPython() call before processing b64
findings.est_impact: Could cause crashes when screenshot fails silently

findings.issue: Two sequential Claude API calls (readResponse then extractResponse) could be combined into single call with chained prompt
findings.suggestion: Merge extraction logic into one message to reduce token overhead and latency
findings.est_impact: ~30% reduction in API calls per channel scan

findings.issue: notifyJarvis() and triggerAutonomous*() functions silently swallow all errors with empty catch blocks
findings.suggestion: Add minimal logging or retry logic for failed notifications to Jarvis
findings.est_impact: Silent failures prevent visibility into system communication breaks

findings.issue: Market quote fetching (getLiveQuote) duplicates similar API call logic for both spy and nq
findings.suggestion: Consolidate into single function accepting array of tickers

findings.issue: runGlanceCycle() called every 10 intraday cycles (900s) but has no independent rate limiting; could cause overlapping scans
findings.suggestion: Track last glance execution time to enforce minimum 15-minute gap independently
